text:
Created attachment 212503
cad/Slic3r x11-toolkits/p5-Wx

I change format of version and I remove change for p5-Alien-wxWidgets because somebody fixed it in the meantime.

I checked every port with portlint and build all in poudriere. Also I ran slic3r.pl with gui from poudriere with success. Only I have doubt about one dependence graphics/mesa-dri I think that shouldn't be in RUN_DEPENDS.
Correct me if I'm wrong.
